title: Fix missing Add Team Member option in UI

requirements.summary: Ensure the 'Add Team Member' button is visible and functional on the Team Members page
acceptanceCriteria: An 'Add Team Member' button is visible on the Team Members page when logged in as an admin
Clicking the button opens the AddUserModal dialog
The modal allows submitting a new user and the new member appears in the list after creation
The button does not appear for non-admin users if role-based visibility is intended

file_operations.description: Review the component to ensure the 'Add Team Member' button is rendered in the page header or toolbar. Check for any missing conditional logic, incorrect auth guards, or rendering bugs that prevent the button from displaying. Ensure the button has an onClick handler that opens the AddUserModal component. If the button is missing entirely, add it to the UI with proper styling consistent with other action buttons in the app. Verify the AddUserModal is properly imported and its state management (open/close) is correctly wired.

requirements.summary: Audit the AdminDashboard team members tab to ensure 'Add Team Member' action is accessible
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Team Member' option is visible in the team members tab of the Admin Dashboard
The option correctly invokes the AddUserModal

file_operations.description: Review the team members tab section of the AdminDashboard to check if an 'Add Team Member' button or action trigger exists. If missing, add the button with appropriate positioning and styling. Ensure the AddUserModal component is imported if not already present. Wire the button's onClick to open the AddUserModal. Verify that the button respects any existing conditional rendering or role-based visibility logic. Check for broken imports or incorrect component references that may have hidden the button.
